revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 7''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 7th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 7 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:7 رجب]] [[fa:۷ رجب]] [[id:7 Rajab]] [[sd:7 رجب]] [[ur:7 رجب]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 7''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 7th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 7 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:7 رجب]] [[fa:۷ رجب]] [[id:7 Rajab]] [[sd:7 رجب]] [[ur:7 رجب]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 7''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 7th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 7 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:7 رجب]] [[fa:۷ رجب]] [[id:7 Rajab]] [[sd:7 رجب]] [[ur:7 رجب]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4135985]])
Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121593)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Rajab]] to [[Category:qqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Removing from [[Category:Qqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:7 رجب]][[ckb:٧ی ڕەجەب]][[fa:۷ رجب]][[id:7 Rajab]][[ms:7 Rejab]][[sd:7 رجب]][[ur:7 رجب]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Rajab}}

'''Rajab 7''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 7th day of the month [[Rajab]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]
[[Category:Days 7 of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Rajab]]
[[ar:7 رجب]]
[[fa:۷ رجب]]
[[id:7 Rajab]]
[[sd:7 رجب]]
[[ur:7 رجب]]
{{Islamic Calendar}}
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]{{wikidata link|Q4121593}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Wikidata has English label]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:7 رجب]][[ckb:٧ی ڕەجەب]][[fa:۷ رجب]][[id:7 Rajab]][[ms:7 Rejab]][[sd:7 رجب]][[ur:7 رجب]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:7 رجب]][[ckb:٧ی ڕەجەب]][[fa:۷ رجب]][[id:7 Rajab]][[ms:7 Rejab]][[sd:7 رجب]][[ur:7 رجب]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:7 رجب]][[ckb:٧ی ڕەجەب]][[fa:۷ رجب]][[id:7 Rajab]][[ms:7 Rejab]][[sd:7 رجب]][[ur:7 رجب]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rajab}}
'''Rajab 7''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 7th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:7 رجب]] [[fa:۷ رجب]] [[id:7 Rajab]] [[sd:7 رجب]] [[ur:7 رجب]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
{{wikidata link|Q4121593}} [[Category:Days 7 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
